color.name: --color-text-highlight
color.usage: Checkbox's checkmark glyph; same value as action-highlight/border-focus, kept as a distinct token.

color.name: --color-surface-feature
color.usage: Bound to Card's background in Figma; distinct token from surface-primary even though unrelated in value.

color.name: --color-sand-400
color.usage: Primitive palette token; Card binds to this directly rather than a semantic text/surface token.

typography.name: --text-label
typography.usage: Type style (font size, line height, family).

typography.name: --text-h6
typography.usage: Type style (font size, line height, family).

typography.name: --text-paragraph-small
typography.usage: Type style (font size, line height, family).

typography.name: --text-h3
typography.usage: Type style (font size, line height, family).

spacing.name: --spacing-00
spacing.usage: px, not rem: the host app sets root font-size to 18px (see index.css), which would otherwise scale every rem-based Tailwind utility 1.125x off its nominal value. Design tokens must stay pixel-exact regardless of the host's font-size choice.

spacing.name: --spacing-01
spacing.usage: px, not rem: the host app sets root font-size to 18px (see index.css), which would otherwise scale every rem-based Tailwind utility 1.125x off its nominal value. Design tokens must stay pixel-exact regardless of the host's font-size choice.

spacing.name: --spacing-02
spacing.usage: px, not rem: the host app sets root font-size to 18px (see index.css), which would otherwise scale every rem-based Tailwind utility 1.125x off its nominal value. Design tokens must stay pixel-exact regardless of the host's font-size choice.

spacing.name: --spacing-03
spacing.usage: px, not rem: the host app sets root font-size to 18px (see index.css), which would otherwise scale every rem-based Tailwind utility 1.125x off its nominal value. Design tokens must stay pixel-exact regardless of the host's font-size choice.

radius.name: --radius-sm
radius.usage: Overrides Tailwind's default rounded-sm (2px) / rounded-xl (12px) / rounded-2xl (16px) scale to match the extracted radius tokens.

radius.name: --radius-xl
radius.usage: Overrides Tailwind's default rounded-sm (2px) / rounded-xl (12px) / rounded-2xl (16px) scale to match the extracted radius tokens.

radius.name: --radius-2xl
radius.usage: Overrides Tailwind's default rounded-sm (2px) / rounded-xl (12px) / rounded-2xl (16px) scale to match the extracted radius tokens.

motion.name: --duration-standard / --ease-standard
motion.usage: Not Figma-sourced (the file has no motion variables). Formalizes the identical transition-colors duration-150 ease-out already used in Button/Input/Select/Textarea/Checkbox.

shadowNote: No shadow tokens are defined. The Figma source file has zero effect styles, and no component in this system currently uses box-shadow. This is an accurate empty state, not an omission — see the Shadows foundation page.
